user.title: Panasonic Window-Type Air Conditioner (Hong Kong / Macau)
user.description: For Panasonic window / through-the-wall air conditioners sold in Hong Kong and Macau (CW-HU, CW-HZ, CW-SU and CW-SUL series). Reverse-engineered and verified on a CW-HU70ZA; other models that use the same IR remote should work, but this does not claim to cover every CW-* model worldwide. Choose the infrared emitter (e.g. a Broadlink blaster) that should send the commands.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this air conditioner (e.g. the room it is in).
data_description.emitter: The infrared.* entity that will transmit the IR codes.

abort.no_emitters: No infrared emitters were found. Add an infrared blaster (e.g. an ESPHome IR proxy or a supported Broadlink device) first, then try again.
